title: CredentialFormat
description: Technical encoding formats for verifiable credentials

wire_format_mapping.description: Maps each protocol-level CredentialFormat identifier to its OID4VCI wire-format string(s). Implementations receiving credentials over OID4VCI SHOULD normalise wire strings to the canonical protocol identifier.

wire_format_aliases.description: Additional legacy or draft wire-format strings that SHOULD be accepted by normalisation logic.

MDOC.typical_use: Mobile driver's licenses (mDL), Digital Travel Credentials (DTC)

SD_JWT_VC.description: IETF Selective Disclosure JWT Verifiable Credential

VC_JWT.description: W3C Verifiable Credential encoded as a JSON Web Token
standards: W3C VC Data Model v1.1 / v2.0
VC_JWT.typical_use: Open Badges v3, enterprise credentials, OID4VCI generic

JSON_LD.description: W3C Verifiable Credential with Linked Data Proof
standards: W3C VC Data Model v1.1 / v2.0

ZK_MDOC.description: Zero-knowledge mDoc — ISO/IEC 18013-5 mDoc extended with zero-knowledge proof capabilities
ZK_MDOC.typical_use: Privacy-preserving mDL verification with range proofs and selective disclosure
